_comment: Enhanced Databricks Workflow v2.0 — Enterprise Retail Analytics Platform
Databricks UI → Workflows → Create Job → ⋮ (kebab menu) → Import JSON
OR via CLI:  databricks jobs create --json @databricks_workflow.json
BEFORE IMPORTING — change these three things:
1. Replace WORKSPACE_PATH with your actual notebook folder path
2. Set your alert_email if you want failure notifications
3. Set pause_status to UNPAUSED when ready to activate the schedule
name: Enterprise Retail Analytics Platform v2.0 — Daily Pipeline

tasks.description: Master orchestrator: data generator → Bronze → Silver → Gold (with RFM, Inventory, Forecast)

schedule._comment: Runs at 02:00 UTC daily. Change pause_status to UNPAUSED to activate.

email_notifications._comment: Add your email(s) here as a backup to the in-pipeline alerting
